response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use a udp sender and measure the time between sending a packet and receiving a response

We can use a timer to measure the time taken

We can also use a network monitoring tool to see the time taken

We can also use a packet capture tool to see the time taken

We can also use a network analyzer to see the time taken

We can also use a network performance tool to see the time taken

We can also use a network diagnostic tool to see the time taken

We can also use a network speed test tool to see the time taken

We can also use a network latency test tool to see the time taken

We can also use a network bandwidth test tool to see the time taken
